trials.output:
The module is complete. Here's the structure:

```
reading-list/
├── package.json          # Module manifest with modnet MSS tags
├── index.ts              # Bun HTTP server with routes
├── types.ts              # Book, Stats, FilterParams types
├── store.ts              # JSON-backed CRUD + filtering/sorting
├── render.ts             # HTML rendering (stats, book cards, forms, filters)
├── data/books.json       # Persistent storage
└── skills/reading-list/SKILL.md
```

**Key features:**
- **Add books** with title, author, genre, page count, cover URL, and initial status
- **Progress tracking** — update current page; auto-advances status to "reading" or "completed"
- **Per-book progress bars** with color-coded status badges
- **Stats dashboard** — completed count, reading count, want-to-read count, total pages read, average progress %
- **Filter by status and genre**, sort by title/author/progress/date added
- **Status management** — dropdown to switch between want-to-read / reading / completed
- All data persisted to `data/books.json`

The reading list module is complete. Here's what was created:

**Files:**
- `package.json` — Module manifest with modnet MSS tags (education/list/none)
- `types.ts` — Type definitions for Book, ReadingStatus, BookStore, FilterParams
- `store.ts` — Data layer using Bun.file/Bun.write for CRUD operations on `data/books.json`
- `render.ts` — HTML rendering with all UI components
- `index.ts` — HTTP request handler with routing
- `skills/reading-list/SKILL.md` — Seed skill documentation
- `data/books.json` — Empty initial data store

**Features:**
- Add books with title, author, genre, page count, and cover image URL
- Three statuses: want-to-read, reading, completed
- Per-book progress bar with current/total pages and percentage
- Stats dashboard: completed count, reading count, want-to-read count, total pages read, average progress
- Filter by status and genre (with genre autocomplete from existing entries)
- Books sorted by status priority (reading first) then by date added
- Auto-completes progress when marking a book as completed
- Auto-marks as completed when page count reaches total

The reading list module is complete. Here's what was created:

**Files:**
- `package.json` — Module manifest with MSS tags (education/list/none/scale 2)
- `skills/reading-list/SKILL.md` — Seed skill documentation
- `types.ts` — Type definitions for Book, BookInput, BookUpdate, ReadingStats
- `store.ts` — Data layer using `Bun.file`/`Bun.write` with JSON persistence in `data/books.json`
- `render.ts` — Server-side HTML renderer with full UI (stats bar, book cards, progress bars, add form, filters)
- `server.ts` — Bun HTTP server on port 3000
- `data/books.json` — Empty initial data store

**Features:**
- **Add books** with title, author, genre, page count, and optional cover image URL
- **Track progress** by updating current page number per book
- **Progress bars** per book showing percentage read, colored by status
- **Overall stats** dashboard: total books, completed, reading, want-to-read, total pages read, average progress %
- **Status workflow**: want-to-read / reading / completed (marking completed auto-sets page to max)
- **Filtering** by status and genre via dropdowns
- **API endpoints**: `GET/POST /api/books`, `PATCH/DELETE /api/books/:id`, `GET /api/stats`
